title: Z-Score Outlier Detection
content: Z = (X - mean) / std. Values with |Z| > 3 are typically outliers.

title: Correlation Coefficient
content: Pearson r ranges from -1 to 1. 0=no correlation, 1=perfect positive, -1=perfect negative.

title: P-Value Interpretation
content: p < 0.05 is statistically significant. p < 0.01 is highly significant.
